## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and which issue is fixed. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code Quality / Refactoring (ktlint / detekt / tests)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.
- [ ] Local unit tests
- [ ] Screenshot or unit/Robolectric test checks
- [ ] Manual verification in emulator

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have run `./gradlew ktlintCheck` and corrected all formatting issues
- [ ] I have run `./gradlew detekt` and addressed all lint issues
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or deprecations
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest`
